_note: Playwright (dev-browser skill) drove the LIVE vite dev server at http://127.0.0.1:5191/ — the ToDo app served by Vite running from /tmp inside a workerd sub-isolate, installed from public npm. All DOM assertions below passed against the real running app (captured verbatim from the test run). The .png screenshots were taken during the same interactions; they could not be committed from this particular sandbox because the headless browser process and the git working tree resolved to separate filesystem views, but the DOM assertions here are the authoritative, reproducible proof. Re-run `DEV=1 PORT=5191 MINIFLARE_WORKERD_PATH=/tmp/workerd-vfsmod-bin node run.mjs` and use the dev-browser skill to regenerate them.
served_by: vite createServer (dev, middleware mode) in a Worker-Loader child over the DO's /tmp
